tools.name: cve_lookup
tools.description: Look up a CVE by ID and get a compact summary: description, CVSS score & severity, vector, CWE weakness, publish date, and references. Source: NVD (NIST).

tools.name: package_vulnerabilities
tools.description: List known vulnerabilities for a software package (optionally a specific version) via OSV. Ecosystems: npm, pypi, cargo, go, maven, rubygems, nuget, composer, pub, hex.

tools.name: audit_dependencies
tools.description: Audit a whole dependency manifest for known vulnerabilities in one call. Paste a package.json (as 'manifest'), or pass a 'dependencies' array of {name, version} objects. Returns per-package findings and a summary. Ecosystem defaults to npm.
